elements.description: Circled numeral '4' marking a vertical post/member at the eave edge, below the roof slope
Vertical dimension line labeled 'ระยะตามแบบแปลนสถาปัตย์ ประมาณ ±1.30 ม.' (approximate, per architectural plan) running down beside the post, from roof edge to a lower reference point

warnings: This detail (R1) is referenced from the carport-side eave on section รูปตัด 2 (หน้า10, 'เชิงชาย1 (R1) ดูแบบขยาย A-16') and shows an overhang measured from reference line gridC, matching a 1.50m dimension.

This sheet (A-16) contains 3 distinct views: this eave detail (R1, top-left), a second eave detail (R2, bottom-left) — see sibling _หน้า18_eave_r2.json — and a steel sunshade lattice detail (top-right) — see sibling _หน้า18_sunshade_lattice.json.

Content and dimensions closely mirror house 1's equivalent eave detail (same 8"+8" fascia board spec, same FLASHING note, same ±1.30m approximate vertical note) — cross-consistent with the shared government housing-program template.
